highlights: Designed, developed, and refactored large scale monolithic and microservices based systems for enterprise clients including Cocomore, Inchcape, PPG and others.
Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements, clarify technical constraints, and provide regular delivery updates.
Implemented new features, optimized existing functionality, and improved system performance, scalability, and maintainability.
Tested and validated npm packages, smart contracts, and transaction workflows, providing detailed feedback to the core development team.
Contributed to ecosystem growth by creating technical and educational content for the public community.
Identified and documented bugs, inconsistencies, and usability issues to support stable releases.
Contributed to the development and maintenance of large internal ERP and HRM systems using .NET technologies.
Refactored legacy codebases to enhance performance, readability, and long term maintainability.
Implemented new features and enhancements based on business and operational requirements.
